title: Roadmap Artifact
description: Defines the structure of roadmap.yaml — the primary artifact produced by plan-roadmap and consumed by autopilot-roadmap.

roadmap_id.description: Unique identifier for this roadmap, typically derived from the source proposal filename.

source_proposal.description: Path or URI to the original long markdown proposal that was decomposed.

policy.description: Vendor scheduling policy configuration for this roadmap.

cost_ceiling_usd.description: Maximum additional cost allowed when switching vendors. Required when default_action is switch_if_time_saved.

max_switch_attempts_per_item.description: Maximum vendor switches allowed per roadmap item before failing closed.

preferred_vendor.description: Primary vendor to use for implementation. Falls back to alternates per policy.

item_id.description: Unique item identifier within this roadmap (e.g., 'ri-01').

description.description: Brief description of the capability or change this item delivers.

rationale.description: Why this item is needed and how it contributes to the overall proposal.

change_id.description: OpenSpec change-id once the item is approved and scaffolded. Null while in planning.

priority.description: Execution priority (1 = highest). May be updated by learning feedback.

depends_on.description: Item IDs that must complete before this item can execute.

acceptance_outcomes.description: Measurable outcomes that define when this item is complete.

failure_reason.description: Populated when status is 'failed' — explains why implementation failed.

blocked_by.description: Populated when status is 'blocked' — lists missing dependency IDs or vendor constraints.

learning_refs.description: Paths to learning entries (in learnings/ subfolder) that influenced this item's priority or scope.
